patch.value: pm create/update mutation output always emits full changed_fields array (~50% of payload) with no way to suppress it

Repro: PM_AUTHOR=x pm create issue 'probe' (default TOON). Observed: 21-line output where 11 lines are a 'changed_fields' array listing id,title,description,type,status,priority,tags,created_at,updated_at,author on EVERY create; update emits the same pattern. The item body directly above already shows the set values, so changed_fields is largely redundant for the create case. Expected: a way to trim mutation output for agent loops, e.g. accept --fields (already works on get, rejected on create with 'Unknown option --fields'), or a --quiet/--no-changed-fields, or drop the full changed_fields list on create (keep it on update where it signals the delta). Severity: low (token efficiency in high-volume agent create loops; ~50% of create payload is the redundant array). Note: prior verbosity item pm-3pbs was scoped to pm activity/history only, not mutations.

value.author: dogfood-agent
value.text: Dedup checks run against real tracker (no PM_PATH override) on 2026-05-25 before filing: (1) pm search 'create update changed_fields verbose suppress quiet flag' --limit 12 -> hits pm-rnpb(in_progress parent), pm-5k2w(init verbosity, closed), pm-swie/pm-ote/pm-j1v7/pm-phob/pm-kpz5/pm-wo8/pm-ysgr/pm-mfza/pm-06t (all unrelated create/update feature work, closed) -- none about output verbosity/changed_fields suppression. (2) pm search 'mutation output quiet compact' -> pm-3pbs (closed) reduces verbosity of pm ACTIVITY/HISTORY and adds compact mode to history, NOT create/update mutations -- scope differs. (3) pm list --status open --limit 30 -> pm-59gj,pm-gt82,pm-3cbk (none related). (4) pm list --status in-progress --limit 20 -> pm-rnpb,pm-7rlp,pm-cf1u (none related). Conclusion: no open or recently-closed item covers suppressing/trimming create/update mutation output. Filed as new under pm-rnpb.

value.author: codex-full-audit
value.text: Full audit confirmation: mutation JSON output remains a real token-efficiency issue and is not solved in this slice. Manual/sub-agent dogfood still shows bulky changed_fields/linked object payloads as a high-value optimization for agents. This pass focused on command recovery, package validation, SDK/package boundary, and vector cache correctness; leave pm-ch59 open for explicit compact mutation-output projection work.

value.author: manual-dogfood-specialist
value.text: Manual dogfood evidence 2026-05-25: create/update JSON outputs in the temp LaunchOps project still repeatedly emitted large changed_fields arrays. On first create, changed_fields listed id/title/description/type/status/priority/tags/created_at/updated_at/deadline/author/body; update with comment/note/learning emitted a full item plus changed_fields. This confirms the open token-cost concern remains relevant for agents; fields projections help reads but mutation outputs still need a compact/default projection or a way to suppress changed_fields without losing deterministic mutation evidence.

value.author: manual-dogfood-subagent
value.text: Manual dogfood reconfirmed mutation output verbosity: create/update/claim/close/comment-style commands returned full item/comment payloads by default. In small temp project this was usable, but comments on pm-rnpb returned a massive historical comment array, reinforcing the need for compact mutation acknowledgements / suppressible changed_fields and append outputs for token efficiency.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: IMPLEMENTED (branch agent-ux-compact-mutation-output-and-flag-recovery). Approach: shared pure helper src/core/output/mutation-projection.ts projectMutationResult() drops the verbose changed_fields array and replaces it with changed_field_count (deterministic mutation evidence, ~no token cost). Two surfaces: (1) CLI global flag --no-changed-fields (main.ts opt) -> GlobalOptions.noChangedFields (command-types.ts + registration-helpers.getGlobalOptions opts.changedFields===false) -> OutputOptions.noChangedFields -> printResult projects before formatOutput; applies uniformly to ALL mutation commands since they route through printResult. (2) MCP agent path: runAction create/update/close/append/update-many are compact-by-default (changed_field_count) unless options.full=true (withMutationCompaction strips the full flag before the runner); pm_create/pm_update/pm_close tool descriptions document it. Discoverability: added --no-changed-fields to SUBCOMMAND_GLOBAL_FLAG_CONTRACTS (pm contracts) + completion (bash global tail x26, zsh _arguments global block, fish global defs). Coverage: helper added to vitest include (100% via tests/unit/mutation-projection.spec.ts). Tests: mutation-projection unit (6 cases), output.spec printResult noChangedFields, mcp-dynamic compact-by-default+full opt-out. Manual smoke (temp dir): default keeps changed_fields; --no-changed-fields -> changed_field_count:10 (TOON+JSON); default --json still has changed_fields (backward compatible).

author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: Add --no-changed-fields flag and compact MCP mutation output to drop the redundant changed_fields array

message: Retitle to delivered change for changelog clarity (original problem framing retained in description)

patch.value: Shipped on branch agent-ux-compact-mutation-output-and-flag-recovery. Added shared projectMutationResult helper (src/core/output/mutation-projection.ts, 100% covered), global --no-changed-fields CLI flag, and MCP compact-by-default for create/update/close/append/update-many (opt back in with options.full). Root-cause fix: extractCommandScopedOptions strips the new global so it never counts as an update field (fixes update-many rollback + update no-op). Full coverage gate green (1819 tests, 100%), 16/16 dogfood checks pass, check-secrets clean.
Added --no-changed-fields CLI flag and made MCP mutations compact-by-default by dropping the redundant changed_fields array; saves tokens for agents on every mutation.
Mutations omit the changed_fields list when --no-changed-fields is set; MCP responses default to compact projection without breaking existing JSON consumers.
Shipped projectMutationResult helper and ChangedFieldsOptions; MCP server defaults to compact; full release gate + 1809 tests pass; CI green on PR #72; merged 2026-05-25.
